note: Baron et al. 1988 states the Stephan 1981 vestibular volumes were measured from one side only (the reformat names the data columns with the _unilateral suffix)
Bauernfeind Table 1 is the LEFT insula; right hemisphere is the paper's Table 2 (now snapshotted as Bauernfeind_etal_2013_Table2)
Bauernfeind Table 2 is the RIGHT insula (the left is Table 1); combined to both-hemisphere insula in volumes_compiled.R
Semendeferi 1998 area 13 (orbitofrontal) measured from the right hemisphere only; n=1/species
Semendeferi 2001 area 10 (frontal pole) measured from the right hemisphere only; n=1/species
Sherwood 2005 cranial motor nuclei measured on the left side only

de Sousa et al. 2010 measured V1 (area striata) grey matter from the LEFT hemisphere only; kept left-only (no right counterpart in the table) so it is never merged/averaged with both-hemisphere V1 from other sources
de Sousa et al. 2010 measured the lateral geniculate nucleus from the LEFT hemisphere only
